Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Deem Matters Admitted
Off Calendar Jan-15-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Roger E. Jackson, esq. (707-318-2994) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC's Motion For Order To Deem Matters Admitted:

Plaintiff Unifund CCR, LLC's unopposed Motion for Order to Deem Matters Admitted is GRANTED. The matters stated in plaintiff's Requests for Admissions, Set One are deemed admitted. Plaintiff shall prepare a form of order that attaches the Requests for Admissions as an exhibit.

Prevailing party to send proposed order tracking the tentative ruling via email to peter.catalanotti@wilsonelser.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
